subject: refactor(theme): simplify to Forest only with dark/light toggle
body:
Remove multi-theme combo system (Nordic, Corporate, Cafe, Silk) — keep only
Forest (lemonade/abyss) with dark/light toggle. Reduces complexity by ~490
lines across CSS, theme config, hook, and UI. Theme combos can be re-added
later if needed.

Also cleans up stale TODO items: moves user-action items (pipeline run, Expo
upgrade, Mapbox proxy) to USER_ACTIONS.md, removes irrelevant items (PDF
download, theme combos, global.css dedup).

Tags: theme, simplification, cleanup, docs
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-simplification
Semver: minor
